case_title: XIU JUAN WU VS. JAIME RENOVATO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, XIU JUAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-02-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-02-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRTER ANA ARAUJO INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. YONG XIAN INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-02-2011 - JUDGMENT.
